Who I Am

BUILT FOR PLAYERS
WHO WANT MORE

DOTNX LAB is not your average soccer program. It's an elite development system designed to sharpen every dimension of your game — from first touch to final decision under pressure.

Whether you're just starting out or pushing toward a professional level, every session is built around your specific goals, your weaknesses, and your ceiling.

No filler. No wasted time. Just purposeful reps and measurable results.

DOTNX
The Coach

COACH DONY — THE STORY

Coach Dony
Dony Dosmutov
Founder · DOTNX LAB Training
Rubin Kazan Toronto FC Academy CSKA Moscow 4+ Yrs Coaching

For as long as I can remember, soccer has been a major part of my life. I started playing at five years old with Rubin Kazan, then spent six years developing with Toronto FC's academy, and later trained for two years at CSKA Moscow — mentored by elite coaches and playing alongside some of the brightest prospects in the game.

Those experiences didn't just make me a better player. They taught me what it truly means to be a professional — how athletes develop, what holds them back, and how to guide them to the level they're trying to reach.

Over the past four years, I've coached players at every level. That work inspired me to create DOTNX LAB — a platform that combines coaching, performance science, and complete athlete development.

I don't just build physical skills. I build the mindset needed to excel.

See Training Options

CHOOSE YOUR SESSION

Every session is personalized. Every rep has a purpose. Pick the format that works for you.

Private Sessions

Per session · 1-on-1

  • Team & positional awareness
  • Game-speed decision making

4 private sessions / month

🎥 Online Service
Game Film Analysis
$50
Per session · delivered online
I break down your game footage or training video and show you the game through a completely different lens — the patterns, decisions, and positioning moments you never noticed. This is how I improve your overall understanding of soccer, using real footage to unlock a new level of game IQ.
  • Full breakdown of your game or training footage
  • Tactical & positional analysis
  • Decision-making & reading the game
  • Timestamped coaching notes sent to you
  • Improve your soccer IQ through a new lens

📋 Online Service
Custom Workout Plan
$30
One-time · sent digitally
A fully tailored workout plan built around your individual needs, position, and goals — sent straight to you online so you can train on your own schedule, anywhere.
  • 100% tailored to your needs & position
  • Soccer-specific fitness & conditioning
  • Strength, speed & agility programming
  • Clear weekly structure you can follow anywhere
  • Delivered digitally — train on your schedule

FAQ

GOT QUESTIONS?

How do I book a session? +
Message me on Instagram @dotnx_lab or email donydosmtov@gmail.com with your name, age, session type, and availability. I'll confirm your spot fast.
What age groups do you train? +
All ages — from young beginners to adult competitive players. Every session is tailored to your level so no one is left behind and no one is held back.
Where do sessions take place? +
Sessions are held at local fields and facilities in the Vaughan, ON area. Exact location confirmed when you book. Indoor and outdoor options available.
What should I bring? +
Cleats or turf shoes, comfortable training gear, and a ball if you have one. I provide equipment. Bring water and the right mentality.
How do I pay? +
Payment accepted via e-transfer or cash, due before or at the start of each session. Details provided when you book.
Can I cancel or reschedule? +
Yes — I ask for at least 24 hours notice. Late cancellations may be subject to a small fee.
How does Game Film Analysis work? +
Send me your game or training footage. I'll break it down completely — movement, decisions, positioning, patterns you might not notice. You receive detailed coaching notes with timestamps. $50, delivered online.
How does the Custom Workout Plan work? +
Message me with your position, fitness level, and goals. I'll build a fully tailored soccer-specific plan — strength, speed, agility, conditioning — sent digitally so you can train anywhere. $30, one-time.
